Name: Biostars
column8: Has public JSON API (https://www.biostars.org/info/api/) – can query questions

Name: Bioinformatics Stack Exchange
column9: Use Stack Exchange API (site=bioinformatics.stackexchange.com) with tags “metagenome”

Name: Bioconductor Support Forum
done: Exposes JSON feeds (Biostar-style backend) – scrape via /api or RSS for posts tagged “microbiome”

Name: QIIME 2 Forum
column8: Runs on Discourse – append .json to URLs or use /latest.json to fetch threads and replies by category

Name: ResearchGate Discussions
Focus/Content: Q&A about metagenomics methods and interpretation
Scraping Description: Difficult to scrape automatically – best via manual export or web automation respecting ToS

Name: SEQanswers
done: Classic forum (vBulletin/XenForo) – scrape thread lists and replies via BeautifulSoup; paginate by forum section “Metagenomics”

Name: Reddit r/bioinformatics
column8: Use Reddit JSON API (append .json to URLs or query via Pushshift API for “metagenomics”

Name: Stack Overflow (bioinformatics tag)
Focus/Content: Programming and parsing tasks in metagenomics workflows
Scraping Description: Use Stack Exchange API (site=stackoverflow) with tags “bioinformatics”

Name: Illumina Community
column8: Access requires authentication for some threads; scrape manually or via approved API if available

Name: Oxford Nanopore Community
column8: Login-gated content – scraping not advised without explicit permission

Name: Mothur Forum
column8: Also Discourse-based – use same API endpoints as QIIME2 for threads

Name: Uncertainty quantification in output from biotools using models (llm)
